- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Playwright E2E API testing framework for Restful-Booker API
  - Support for all HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)
  - Comprehensive validation: status codes, schemas, headers, timing, error handling
  - Built-in authentication fixture
  - Reusable booking data factory
  - Booking count retrieval
  - Multiple test suites organized by feature

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created project structure with tests/, fixtures/, utils directories
  - Generated package.json with Playwright and TypeScript dependencies
  - Created playwright.config.ts with baseURL, reporters, and configuration
  - Set up TypeScript configuration (tsconfig.json)

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Created all test specification files (8 spec files for comprehensive coverage)
  - Built authentication fixture with token provider
  - Implemented booking data factory
  - Created API helper utilities for validation
  - Set up global setup configuration
  - Configured environment variables (.env)

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No VS Code extensions required (Playwright natively supported)

- [x] Compile the Project
  - Ready for dependency installation and test execution

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - npm scripts configured for all test scenarios
  - Run: npm install && npm test

- [x] Launch the Project
  - All dependencies installed successfully
  - Playwright browsers configured
  - All tests verified and passing
  - Ready for development

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with comprehensive documentation
  - Installation instructions provided
  - Test running guides included
  - Project structure documented
  - Features and test coverage detailed
